expectations.text: Script creates spline data element with data_element create spline
AKISPL function is used for the nonlinear X-direction force
force create direct general_force is used (NOT force create element_like bushing)
expectations.evidence: Uses force create direct general_force exclusively; no force create element_like bushing anywhere in the script

expectations.text: Spline table covers -10mm to 10mm with (-10,-8000), (-5,-3000), (0,0), (5,3000), (10,8000) data points
Y and Z force functions are linear (5000 * DY or 5000 * DZ, or equivalent)
Rotational torque functions implement 200 N·mm/deg stiffness (using AX/AY/AZ with /1D conversion, or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: x_torque_function = "(-200.0 / 1D) * AX(...)", same pattern for y_torque_function and z_torque_function

expectations.text: All keywords spelled out fully — no abbreviated commands
expectations.evidence: All commands fully spelled: part create rigid_body name_and_position, part modify rigid_body mass_properties, marker create, data_element create spline, constraint create joint fixed, force create direct general_force

expectations.text: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: All names use full .rubber_mount_model. prefix, e.g. .rubber_mount_model.subframe.mount_i_mkr, .rubber_mount_model.chassis.mount_j_mkr

expectations.text: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No adams_id keyword appears in the CMD file; response.md explicitly states 'adams_id is never specified'

expectations.text: Mass/inertia set with part modify rigid_body mass_properties, not part create
expectations.evidence: part create rigid_body name_and_position used for location/orientation only; part modify rigid_body mass_properties used for mass=10.0, ixx/iyy/izz=1000.0

expectations.text: center_of_mass_marker NOT passed in any part modify mass_properties call
expectations.evidence: part modify rigid_body mass_properties only specifies mass, ixx, iyy, izz — no center_of_mass_marker parameter

expectations.text: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log (adams_view_validation)
expectations.evidence: Adams View validation PASSED — no ERROR: lines in aview.log
